texto: So many of us hide from ourselves and we don't even know who we are and why were we here? All peoples will prove they are better and put fake masks on their own faces. Every people pretend herself what they actually not from inside. Afraid to show the reality and hide their best quality. You just have to learn to be yourself and what really makes you happy, or other things that are not important and what others think of you is not important at all.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Silentknight0 que provoca limites e escolhas conscientes. Ao questionar “So many of us hide from ourselves and we don't even know who we are and why were we here? All peo…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre reflexao, fake-people, fear, com foco em inspiracao e termino.
